subject: Mozi Minute: Own Your Name
body:
Words I like: If someone's googling your business name and you're not the ad, you're letting competitors bid on your customers.

Mozi Minute: Own Your Name

Here's the easiest money you'll ever make: Buy Google ads for your own business name + every permutation of it.

- "[Your Business]"
- "[Your Business] reviews"
- "[Your Business] pricing"
- "[Your Business] competitors"

Takes 60 minutes to set up. Costs almost nothing.

I have yet to see someone lose on this.

Most businesses don't do this basic move.

Meanwhile, when you control your branded search terms, you get higher click-through rates and lower costs than generic keywords.

The ROAS is typically massive because people searching your name are already warm prospects.

But here's the real kicker:

Don't send that traffic to your website.

Send it to a landing page with an offer/lead magnet.

Someone googling your name is trying to evaluate you. Give them something to evaluate.

Turn browsers into leads instead of letting them bounce around your website and leave - or worse - going to your competitor.

As promised, money in under a minute.

Own your search, Alex
